title: Star of the Month Award
desc: Awarded in recognition of outstanding contribution, dedication, and for being an inspiring role model within the team.

title: On the Spot (Team) Award
desc: Received for exceptional teamwork and immediate impactful contribution towards organisational goals.

title: tcsAI Idea Igniter
desc: Recognized as a milestone achiever in the tcsAI Hackathon for innovative thinking and successful idea execution.

title: tcsAI Spark
desc: Awarded for enthusiastic and prompt participation in the tcsAI Hackathon, acknowledging contributions to AI-driven innovation.

title: Learning Achievement Award
desc: Honoured for dedication to continuous learning and achieving significant milestones in professional development.
